# holistics_users (Data Source)

List Holistics users, optionally filtered.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `exclude_deleted` (Boolean)
- `has_authentication_token` (Boolean)
- `ids` (Set of Number) Filter by user IDs.
- `role` (String) Filter by role.
- `search_term` (String) Search by email, name, initials, or group name.
- `statuses` (Set of String) Filter by user statuses.

### Read-Only

- `users` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--users))

<a id="nestedatt--users"></a>
### Nested Schema for `users`

Read-Only:

- `allow_authentication_token` (Boolean)
- `created_at` (String)
- `current_sign_in_at` (String)
- `email` (String)
- `enable_export_data` (Boolean)
- `group_ids` (Set of Number)
- `has_authentication_token` (Boolean)
- `id` (Number)
- `initials` (String)
- `is_activated` (Boolean)
- `is_deleted` (Boolean)
- `job_title` (String)
- `last_sign_in_at` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `role` (String)
- `title` (String)
